# Upstream: Leonxlnx/taste-skill

- **Repo:** https://github.com/Leonxlnx/taste-skill
- **Site:** https://www.tasteskill.dev/
- **Pinned:** 2026-04-05
- **Install:** `npx skills add https://github.com/Leonxlnx/taste-skill --skill "<install-name>"`

Skills in this bundle:

| Install name | Upstream folder |
|--------------|-----------------|
| design-taste-frontend | taste-skill |
| high-end-visual-design | soft-skill |
| minimalist-ui | minimalist-skill |
| industrial-brutalist-ui | brutalist-skill |
| redesign-existing-projects | redesign-skill |
| full-output-enforcement | output-skill |
| stitch-design-taste | (Stitch variant in repo) |

Refresh procedure:

1. Update all UI skills together (shared conventions)
2. `npx skills add` per skill or full repo pull
3. Diff each dir under `vendor/skills/taste-skill/`
4. Update pinned date here
